hooks.command: FILE="$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' <<< "$CLAUDE_HOOK_INPUT")"; if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [[ "$FILE" == *.ts || "$FILE" == *.tsx || "$FILE" == *.json ]]; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && npx --no-install biome check --write --no-errors-on-unmatched "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

FILE="$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' <<< "$CLAUDE_HOOK_INPUT")"; case "$FILE" in *"/packages/gas-sheets-orm/src/"*) echo '📋 gas-sheets-orm: DomainModel.validate() and toSheetRow() are public contracts — downstream consumers (katana-sheets-toolkit) depend on them. See CLAUDE.md.' ;; esac
